title: Required Diagnostic Imaging Not Completed Before Execution
scenario: A clinical action depends on diagnostic imaging, but the imaging study has not been completed before execution.
initial_state: The action was authorized assuming required imaging would be completed.
state_transition: Execution is attempted before the required imaging dependency is satisfied.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires reconstruction of required diagnostic dependencies.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the required imaging dependency is incomplete.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when required diagnostic imaging has not been completed.
